display.purpose: Page identity and singular editorial emphasis.

data.purpose: Identifiers, dates, paths, counts, and values.

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Square recovery or secondary action with an explicit amber focus state.
components.css: .ds-secondary-button { background: var(--color-surface, #121718); color: var(--color-paper, #f0eee7); border: 1px solid var(--color-line, #303a3b); border-radius: 0; padding: 10px 16px; font: 600 16px/1.5 'IBM Plex Sans', sans-serif; cursor: pointer; transition: color 160ms ease-out, border-color 160ms ease-out; } .ds-secondary-button:hover { color: var(--color-accent, #e2b85b); border-color: var(--color-accent, #e2b85b); } .ds-secondary-button:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--color-accent, #e2b85b); outline-offset: 4px; }

components.name: Search Field
components.description: Unboxed search control anchored by a strong bottom rule.
components.css: .ds-search { display: grid; gap: 8px; color: var(--color-muted, #aeb7b5); font: 600 14px/1.4 'IBM Plex Sans', sans-serif; } .ds-search input { min-height: 48px; padding: 8px 0; border: 0; border-bottom: 2px solid var(--color-line, #303a3b); border-radius: 0; background: transparent; color: var(--color-paper, #f0eee7); font: 400 18px/1.5 'IBM Plex Sans', sans-serif; outline: none; transition: border-color 160ms ease-out; } .ds-search input:hover { border-color: var(--color-muted, #aeb7b5); } .ds-search input:focus { border-color: var(--color-accent, #e2b85b); }

components.name: Status Label
components.description: Text-first state indicator with a redundant dot cue.
components.css: .ds-status { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; color: var(--color-success, #7fd0a1); font: 700 12px/1.25 'IBM Plex Sans', sans-serif; letter-spacing: .08em; text-transform: uppercase; }

components.name: Benchmark Report Row
components.description: Evidence-first disclosure row with isolated score emphasis.
components.css: .ds-report-row { display: grid; grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr) 128px; gap: 24px; align-items: center; padding: 32px 16px; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--color-line, #303a3b); background: transparent; color: var(--color-paper, #f0eee7); } .ds-report-row > div > strong { font: 700 24px/1 'Barlow Condensed', sans-serif; text-transform: uppercase; } .ds-report-row p { margin: 10px 0 0; color: var(--color-muted, #aeb7b5); font: 400 14px/1.5 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; } .ds-score { border-left: 2px solid var(--color-accent, #e2b85b); padding-left: 16px; } .ds-score span { display: block; color: var(--color-muted, #aeb7b5); font: 700 12px/1.25 'IBM Plex Sans', sans-serif; letter-spacing: .08em; } .ds-score b { display: block; margin-top: 4px; font: 700 36px/1 'Barlow Condensed', sans-serif; } .ds-report-row:hover { background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--color-surface, #121718) 60%, transparent); }

components.name: Task Evidence Card
components.description: Flat bordered container for trial evidence and source actions.
components.css: .ds-task-card { padding: 28px; border: 1px solid var(--color-line, #303a3b); border-radius: 0; background: var(--color-surface, #121718); color: var(--color-paper, #f0eee7); } .ds-task-card h3 { margin: 0 0 24px; font: 700 20px/1 'Barlow Condensed', sans-serif; text-transform: uppercase; } .ds-task-card dl { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr)); gap: 20px 32px; margin: 0; } .ds-task-card dt { color: var(--color-muted, #aeb7b5); font: 700 12px/1.25 'IBM Plex Sans', sans-serif; letter-spacing: .08em; } .ds-task-card dd { margin: 4px 0 0; font: 400 14px/1.5 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; }

narrative.overview: The interface behaves like a public record: claims appear first, supporting evidence remains directly inspectable, and every visual decision reinforces credibility. Its forensic editorial voice combines an oversized condensed headline with compact technical metadata, hard rules, and deliberate empty space. The system is quiet but not timid. Signal Amber creates one controlled point of emphasis; status colors communicate state without replacing explicit labels. Decoration is rejected unless it improves orientation or evidence reading.
keyCharacteristics: Evidence-first hierarchy with one strong editorial focal point.
Flat, square-edged surfaces separated by rules and tonal shifts.
Condensed display typography paired with readable sans-serif body copy.
Monospace reserved for identifiers, measurements, dates, and source metadata.
Motion used only to orient readers during entry and disclosure.

rules.name: The Signal Rarity Rule
rules.body: Signal Amber should occupy a small minority of the page; its scarcity gives it authority.

rules.name: The Explicit Status Rule
rules.body: Color may reinforce state, but every state must remain understandable from text and shape alone.

rules.name: The Evidence Mono Rule
rules.body: Use monospace only when content is an identifier, path, timestamp, count, measurement, or raw value.

rules.name: The Linear Archive Rule
rules.body: Preserve one searchable chronological report stream; do not convert the archive into a card dashboard or aggregate leaderboard without new product evidence.

rules.name: The Flat Evidence Rule
rules.body: Borders and tonal layers carry structure; decorative shadows and glows do not belong.

dos: Do lead with job status, identity, score, model, and time before paths or raw metadata.
Do use hard rules, tonal shifts, and whitespace to separate evidence.
Do keep focus visible and status understandable without color.
Do use brief exponential entrance and disclosure motion only for orientation.
Do retain the asymmetric editorial header as the primary visual signature.
donts: Don't add gradients, glass effects, neon accents, decorative charts, or generic dashboard cards.
Don't use Signal Amber as a large background field or routine body-text color.
Don't introduce rounded containers or shadows that imply floating surfaces.
Don't use monospace for ordinary prose or headings.
Don't let visual drama obscure provenance, failures, missing data, or keyboard access.
